title: Chaos Erupts from the Capital to Udon
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Toko, Orochi Forces, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: The capital erupts after Yasuie’s death while Big Mom’s arrival throws Udon prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He is the murderer, zerojuru!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A Flashy Entrance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And that is the Rebel, Sangoro!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, but I don't have time to stand around with you, brow-goro.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Same here, Moss- JURO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: AmAMAMA!!! DaaaaaddY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: TOKO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that man zerojuro's comrade!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So he's finally shown himself....

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: How dare you interrupt my execution!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yasuieie's daughter... that damn brat... is a criminal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That rat's comrades are coming out one after the other...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, Samura!! kill the ones...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: who dared to interfere with my execution!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You watch her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So zero was in the capital, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's caused a big commotion, but I can't blame him!!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Good work protecting 0-TOKO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must retrieve Lord Yasuieie's body, as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We cannot leave him here on display!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we get caught up in this mess... then we won't be able to stay in the capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We should decide where to meet up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: for when we make our separate escapes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Two-shords style...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing, you idiot!? Why do you think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Tonyasu sacrificed himself...

dialogue.speaker: Ebisu Town Citizens
dialogue.text: Because of the way we laugh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: every- one calls this the ebisu face here in Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is why this town is called EBISU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 720 pound cainion!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kyaya Aaaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: That's Boss Kyoshiro...!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
